'''OutlawTech''' was the fanciful name given to a group of criminal [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] who manufactured security intrusion systems and [[electronic lock breaker]]s.<ref name="EGWT" /> The criminals would be paid to make highly illegal modifications. It existed during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In common slang, an [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] was a technician who's speciality lay in unorthodox mechanical work that was questionable by factory and safety standards (if not outright illegal). This ranged from performing repairs and modifications on [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] to building and modifying military-grade hardware such as weapons, explosives and communications equipment.

{{Company-stub}}
